detail.description:
Looking for a heartwarming game to relax without boredom? Eager to meet like-minded friends but afraid of social awkwardness? This game filled with flowers and surprises solves all your worries!
Dual gameplay of managing a garden + flower shop—therapeutic and fun, plus real flower rewards waiting for you to claim! 

Unlock a World of Blossoms, Manage Your Exclusive Garden & Flower Shop
Dive into a diverse world of flowers in The Cozy Florist! From daisies and lilies of the valley to rare tulips,
